aboutSection: Born and raised in Banja Luka.
I graduated from the Electrotechnical High School in Banja Luka as a telecommunications technician.
I completed my computer science studies at the Pan-European University Apeiron in Banja Luka and became a software engineer.
I worked for Develabs d.o.o. (a partner of Jedox A.G.), where I contributed to the development of EPM software.
Currently, I am working at Alea Partners d.o.o. Banja Luka, where I develop 2D games.

projects.title: JOB POSTING WEB APP
projects.info: A job board web app built with ReactJS, TailwindCSS, and Java. The back-end runs on Tomcat with data managed via MySQL RDBMS. All components are containerized using Docker.
projects.btn_title: Want to post a new job?

projects.title: IMAGE GALLERY w/ PIXABAY API
projects.info: A front-end application that allows users to search a vast library of images using the Pixabay API. Users can search by keywords like 'cats' or 'cars' to receive a grid of image cards with metadata. Results can be filtered by type, such as photos, vectors, or illustrations.

projects.title: RECIPE APP
projects.info: This application allows users to search through over a million different recipes. It features ingredient-based filtering, keyword search, and the ability for users to create their own recipes. The project follows the MVC architecture.

projects.title: TO DO APP
projects.info: A task management application for creating, deleting, and filtering tasks. It persists data and user theme preferences in the browser's local storage. This application is also built using the MVC architecture.

projects.title: AUTOMATIC GARDEN WATERING SYSTEM
projects.info: An irrigation system that opens a valve to discharge water at predetermined times. The first version of this system was developed in 2020.
projects.btn_title: Keep your garden healthy and green

projects.title: THIS PAGE
projects.info: My personal portfolio website, built with HTML, SASS, and vanilla JavaScript for handling the mobile menu, language selection, and local storage preferences.

projects.title: OTHER PROJECTS
projects.info: You can find more of my work on GitHub, including an advice generator app, a time-tracking dashboard, and the Sunnyside agency landing page.
